data.content: Shipment complete. Merged foolery-121b branch to main (commit 50e999521e9b). 4 files changed: repo-switcher.tsx (bootstrap guard for sticky all-repos selection), app-header.tsx (Shift+N respects repo chooser in all-repos mode), plus 2 contract tests. All quality gates pass: lint clean on changed files, tsc clean, 2029/2029 tests passed, build OK. Pushed to origin/main.
